code: import{useState}from'react';import api from'../api/client';import ToastMessage from'../components/ToastMessage';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function SOS(){const user=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user'));const[location,setLocation]=useState('');const[msg,setMsg]=useState('');const[error,setError]=useState('');const getLocation=()=>{if(!navigator.geolocation)return;navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(pos=>{setLocation("".concat(pos.coords.latitude,", ").concat(pos.coords.longitude));});};const trigger=async()=>{setMsg('');setError('');try{await api.post('/sos/trigger',{userId:(user===null||user===void 0?void 0:user.id)||0,message:'Emergency SOS triggered',location:location||'Unknown'});setMsg('SOS alert sent successfully');}catch(err){var _err$response,_err$response$data;setError(((_err$response=err.response)===null||_err$response===void 0?void 0:(_err$response$data=_err$response.data)===null||_err$response$data===void 0?void 0:_err$response$data.error)||'SOS failed');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container py-5 text-center",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"mb-4",children:"Emergency SOS"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn btn-danger btn-lg px-5 py-3 rounded-pill",onClick:trigger,children:"TRIGGER SOS"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"mt-4",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn btn-outline-secondary",onClick:getLocation,children:"Get Current Location"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"mt-3",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Location:"})," ",location||'Not set']}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ToastMessage,{message:msg}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ToastMessage,{message:error,type:"danger"})]});}export default SOS;
